name: Nonconformance Report - Vendor Access Review.pdf
text:
[Page 1]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus
AUD-102  NCR Vendor Access Review
Controlled synthetic enterprise document — for retrieval, review, and workflow testing.
Page 1
DOCUMENT CONTROL
Nonconformance Report — Vendor Access Review
Formal record of an evidence and control-gap issue raised during the Q1 2024 review.
Document ID
AUD-102
Owner
Compliance
Opened Date
2024-03-14
NCR ID
NCR-2024-011
Classification
Internal Use
Synthetic corporate document for demo, evaluation, and retrieval workflows only. All parties, people, systems, repositories, and events are
fictional.
1. Issue Summary
Field
Value
Source
Q1 internal audit checklist (AUD-101)
Description
Two privileged vendor accounts in the Northwind production support tenant were not included in
the current evidence pack with complete owner approval.
Severity
Moderate
Detected On
2024-03-14
Control Reference
POL-031 REQ-IDM-03; CTR-013 Access Management obligations; supplier code evidence
requirement.
2. Immediate Containment
●
Restricted elevated rights for the two identified vendor accounts pending confirmation of business purpose and owner
approval.
●
Requested export of last activity and approval history from IT Operations and the vendor support lead.
●
Opened a remediation item in the Vendor Risk workspace and linked the issue to the Governance Committee agenda.
3. Corrective Actions
Action
Owner
Due Date
Status
Reconstruct access-review evidence and obtain system-owner
sign-off
Priya Nair
2024-03-18
In progress
Negotiate liability cap with vendor legal
Maria Santos
2024-03-22
In progress
Draft SCC Appendix C and transfer rationale memo
James Park
2024-03-25
Open
Define explicit incident response SLOs in policy and contract
package
Alex Rivera
2024-03-28
Open
4. Closure Criteria

[Page 2]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus
AUD-102  NCR Vendor Access Review
Controlled synthetic enterprise document — for retrieval, review, and workflow testing.
Page 2
The NCR may be closed when corrected evidence is archived, the approval artifact is linked in the evidence log, the
governance committee accepts remediation, and the access-review workflow is updated to prevent recurrence.
